summary: Dashboard violates brand palette consistency by using neutral gray backgrounds instead of required diner palette colors, and lacks proper mobile layout implementation for the drawer navigation system.

violations.description: Authenticated dashboard surface uses generic neutral gray/white backgrounds instead of the required diner palette. Should use cream (#fff8ea) for card surfaces and maintain visual continuity with public brand treatment.
Dashboard uses neutral gray UI defaults instead of diner palette surfaces. Primary canvas should use appropriate diner colors, and cards should use cream/white variants from the declared palette.

Mobile narrow contract violation: Dashboard body appears to use a standard mobile layout rather than the required drawer-first layout specified for 390px baseline viewport. The spec requires sidebar navigation through mobile menu trigger with drawer accessibility.
The 'Resend verification email' button uses generic styling instead of the required .diner-button treatment (pink #ffb3c7 with 2px ink border, hard pink shadow, and font-weight 900).

actions: Apply diner palette to dashboard surfaces: use cream (#fff8ea) for card backgrounds and appropriate diner colors for the main canvas
Implement proper drawer-first mobile layout with menu trigger for sidebar navigation access
Replace generic button styling with .diner-button treatment for primary CTA elements
Ensure visual continuity between public brand surfaces and authenticated dashboard experience
